business.name: Sunrise Dental Clinic
business.tagline: Gentle, modern dental care for the whole family.
business.landmark: Above Sunrise Pharmacy, opposite the Metro station.
business.parking: Free two-wheeler parking; paid car parking available in the basement.

faqs.question: What are your working hours / when are you open?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday from 9 AM to 8 PM. On Sundays we are open from 9 AM to 1 PM for emergencies only.

faqs.question: Where are you located / what is your address?
faqs.answer: We are on the 2nd floor of the MG Road building in Kochi, right above Sunrise Pharmacy and opposite the Metro station.

faqs.question: What services or treatments do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer routine check-ups and cleaning, fillings, root canal treatment, teeth whitening, braces and aligners, dental implants, and kids' dentistry.

faqs.question: How much does a consultation or cleaning cost?
faqs.answer: A first consultation is 300 rupees, and it is free if you go ahead with treatment the same day. A standard scaling and cleaning is 1500 rupees.

faqs.question: Which doctors are available?
faqs.answer: Dr. Anjali Menon leads general and cosmetic dentistry, and Dr. Rahul Nair is our root canal and implant specialist.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept most major health insurance plans and offer cashless treatment with our partner insurers. Bring your insurance card for verification.

faqs.question: Do you handle dental emergencies?
faqs.answer: Yes. For severe pain, bleeding or a broken tooth, call us right away and we will give you a same-day emergency slot.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book right now on this call. I just need your name, the treatment you want, and a preferred day and time.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, all major cards, UPI including Google Pay and PhonePe, and cashless insurance.

faqs.question: What languages do your staff speak?
faqs.answer: Our staff speak Malayalam, English and Hindi, so you are welcome to talk in whichever you are most comfortable with.
